title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾为标志，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个基于代理的技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development.
For Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随着用户成长而发展的智能代理项目。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform
native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: ultraworkers/claw-code
content: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
summary: 一个由AI代理管理的博物馆展品，使用Rust语言和Gajae-Code / LazyCodex构建，完全无需人工干预进行开发和维护。
highlights: An agent-managed museum exhibit
built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex
developed and maintained with no human intervention

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
content: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
summary: 一个基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱观察的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改善Claude Code的行为。
highlights: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior
derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用 AI，提供工具以便用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源的编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种大型语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.6、GLM-5.1、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: Investigating idiosyncrasies in AI fiction
summary: 该论文探讨了人工智能生成小说中的独特特征和异常现象，分析了AI在文学创作中的表现与人类作家的差异。
highlights: Investigating idiosyncrasies in AI fiction
https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03136

title: The Control Plane Was the Point: Revisiting autofz in the LLM Era
summary: 文章回顾了autofz在LLM时代的控制平面重要性，强调控制平面是核心。
highlights: The Control Plane Was the Point
Revisiting autofz in the LLM Era

title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
content: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.
summary: OpenAI Signals数据显示ChatGPT在全球范围内的采用率正在增长，用户使用频率增加，探索更多功能，并推动各地区和语言的增长。
highlights: ChatGPT adoption is growing globally
users increasing usage
exploring more capabilities
driving growth across regions and languages

title: Inside Genebench-Pro
summary: Genebench-Pro是OpenAI推出的一个基准测试平台，旨在评估和比较不同AI模型在基因相关任务上的表现，包括基因功能预测、变异影响分析等。该页面通过案例研究展示了平台的设计理念、评估方法以及实际应用效果。
highlights: Genebench-Pro为基因任务提供标准化评估框架
案例研究展示了模型在基因功能预测中的实际表现
平台支持多种基因相关任务的比较分析

title: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
summary: Hugging Face与Cerebras合作，将Gemma 4模型应用于实时语音AI领域，旨在提升语音交互的效率和响应速度。
highlights: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
提升语音交互的效率和响应速度

title: ScarfBench: Benchmarking AI Agents for Enterprise Java Framework Migration
summary: ScarfBench是一个用于评估AI代理在企业Java框架迁移任务中性能的基准测试，旨在衡量AI在自动化代码迁移方面的能力。
highlights: ScarfBench专门针对企业Java框架迁移场景设计
该基准测试用于评估AI代理在复杂代码迁移任务中的表现
由IBM Research提出，聚焦于企业级应用的实际需求
